namespace.description: Represents where is the location of the module in app tree. Similar to PHP namespacing sytem it be used to explicitly as export path of the actions for client frameworks

description.description: Description of module and it's purpose. Used in code gen and creating documents.

version.description: Version of the module. Helpful for different code generation phases but it's not necessary.

name.description: Name of the module. Needs to be lower camel case and Module.go and Module.dyno.go will be generated based on this name.

enums.description: Module level enums which can be used across the other parts of generated code.

dtos.description: Dtos are basically golang structs with some additional functionality which can be used for request/response actions

complexes.description: Complex custom data types definitions and location

actions.description: Actions are similar to controllers in other frameworks. They are custom functionality available via CLI or Http requests and developer need to implement their logic

remotes.description: Remotes are definition of external services which could be contacted via http and Emi developer can make them typesafe by defining them here.

manifests.description: Manifests are a way to create actions bundle

vsqls.description: Typed virtual SQL queries. Each entry pairs a raw SQL string with a typed parameter struct that Emi generates.

name.description: General name of the action used for generating code and CLI commands

cliName.description: Overrides the CLI action name if specified otherwise defaults to Name

cliShort.description: Shortcut to be used along side of the cliName as a shorter alternative

url.description: HTTP route of the action; if not specified the action is CLI-only

method.description: HTTP method type including standard and Emi-specific methods

qs.description: Type-safe query parameters for CLI and HTTP requests

description.description: Action description used in API specs and documentation

in.description: Request body definition similar to HTTP request body

out.description: Response body definition similar to HTTP response body

primitive.description: The primitve that is allowed for the slice is limited to following values

description.description: Description of the capture. Used in generated documentation.

dto.description: Source EmiDto name from top-level Emi.Dto. Preferred over Template if both are set.

template.description: Source EmiDto name from Emi.Templates.Dtos. Ignored when Dto is set.

action.description: Source action body fields. Format: name

include.description: Whitelist of field names to capture from the source DTO. The token 'self.fields' inlines the owner's own fields at that position.

exclude.description: Field names to drop from the captured set (applied after Include).

compiler.description: The compiler which will be picked.

flags.description: The flags to be passed to the compiler

output.description: Output directory of the generated content

name.description: Name of the complex class or struct

namespace.description: Namespace or package name for example in golang

compiler.description: Different compilers can import the definition from different locations

name.description: Name is the identifier for the configuration field used both in Go code and the environment file. By default the name will be converted to uppercase with underscores to reference the environment variable unless overridden by the 'env' field.

type.description: Type defines the data type for the environment variable. It supports standard Go types. such as string

description.description: Description explains the purpose of the configuration field. It can be helpful for developers and also used in CLI for interactive configuration.

default.description: Default specifies the default value for the configuration field if it is not defined.

hint.description: Hint is the value that will be shown in auto complete or cli context as default value - but only to help user for understanding.

env.description: Env allows you to override the default environment variable name

fields.description: Fields defines child configuration fields in case the current field represents an object or an array of subfields. Note that support for nested fields may be limited.

description.description: Description about the purpose of the dto. It will be used in CLI and codegen documentation.

name.description: Name of the dto in camel case the rest of the code related to this dto is being generated based on this

fields.description: List of fields and body definitions of the dto

name.description: Name of the enum in camel case the rest of the code related to this enum is being generated based on this

fields.description: Define the enum fields as an array

k.description: Enum key which will be used in golang generation and validation

description.description: Description of the enum for developers. It's not translated or meant to be shown to end users.

name.description: Name of the field in camel case. Will be upper case automatically when necessary

cli.description: The field name apperance on the cli tools

recommended.description: Recommended field will be asked upon an interactive cli operation.

description.description: Description about the field for developers and generated documents.

type.description: Type of the field based on Emi types.

mapKeyOf.description: In case of type map this is the map key type

mapPairOf.description: In case of type map this is the map key type

primitive.description: The primitve that is allowed for the slice is limited to following values

target.description: The entity in golang which will be operated on in case of type: one or type: collection

default.description: Default value of the field which will be added to the meta tags

module.description: When using one or collection types you need to set the module name here to import tha

provider.description: The go project module of the important target for one or collection fields if its from exte

providerAlias.description: You can set an alias for the provider so the import will be done using that name instead of auto detection. Useful ingolang implementation.

of.description: List of enum values in case of enum type for the field. Check EmiEnumInline for more d

complex.description: In case of complex data type

matches.description: On the json type this field will generate necessary code to cast it into different dtos

fields.description: For types such as array or object children fields can be defined and will separate struct with name prefixed to parent

tags.description: Tags are key/pair values which might be useful in some languages - such as golang. There you can specifiy extra tags for language.

dto.description: The dto name from Emi which will be matched. Might be also work with any other go struct but check the generated code.

name.description: Name of the header accessible on programming languages

description.description: Description of the value and reason usually to developers

complex.description: In case of complex data type

complexNamespace.description: Complex namespace means the prefix which the complex is available for example math.Vector3 the 'math' section is the namespace

package.title: Name
package.description: Package name used in some programming languages with package

mod.title: Name
mod.description: Mod package name such as github.com/org/package

dist.title: Dist
dist.description: The location that manifest will be written

name.description: Name of the field in camel case. Will be upper case automatically when necessary

description.description: Description about the field for developers and generated documents.

type.description: Type of the field based on Emi types.

primitive.description: Primitive type in golang when type: slice is set

fields.description: For types such as array or object children fields can be defined and will separate struct with name prefixed to parent

cliShort.description: Shortcut to be used along side of the cliName as a shorter alternative

url.description: The url which will be requested. You need to add full url here

out.description: Standard EmiActionBody object. Could have fields

in.description: Standard EmiActionBody object. Could have fields entity dto as content and you can define the input parameters as struct in Go and Emi will convert it into json.

query.description: Query params for the address if you want to define them in Golang dynamically instead of URL.

dtos.description: DTOs defined for reuse only. Never compiled into output files; available as capture sources.

actions.description: Actions defined for reuse only. Never compiled; in/out fields are available as capture sources.

description.description: Description of what the query does. Used in generated code documentation.

name.description: Name of the vsql query in camel case. Used as the file and identifier base.

params.description: Typed parameter list for the query

captures.description: Capture fields from existing DTOs into Params. Resolved during preprocessing.

query.description: Raw SQL string the query will execute.
